scenarios.name: Morning Command Center
scenarios.prompt: Give me a morning command center for today. Pull calendar events, unread Gmail, Todoist tasks, and any urgent GitHub notifications. Then rank top 5 priorities and suggest a realistic schedule.

scenarios.name: Weekly Executive Recap
scenarios.prompt: Look back 7 days and produce an executive recap from Calendar, Gmail, and Todoist: wins, misses, follow-ups, and people I should contact this week.

scenarios.name: Germany Photo Story Project
scenarios.prompt: Find my Germany photos, group them by city/day, draft captions, and create a picture-book outline. Save the draft to Drive and give me a share-ready summary.

scenarios.name: Research to Deliverable (Agentic AI)
scenarios.prompt: Find the best current resources on Agentic AI (videos + articles), dedupe weak sources, and create a clean report with links and 1-line takeaways per source. Save to Drive and prepare an email draft to send it.

scenarios.name: Inbox to Action Pipeline
scenarios.prompt: Process my unread email from the last 48 hours, extract action items, create Todoist tasks with due dates, and draft replies for the top 3 threads that need response.
